Judul: Data Analyst
Perusahaan: Pt Matahari Department Store Tbk
Lokasi: Karawaci, Banten
Tipe Kerja: Full-time
Senioritas: -
Keahlian: Excel, R, Statistics, Data Visualization, Dashboard, Analysis, Reporting

Deskripsi:
Responsibilities: Collect, manage, and analyze large datasets related to store performance and operational efficiency. Support ongoing business and improvement projects by providing data insights, reports, and dashboards. Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Operations, Merchandising, and Finance) to ensure accuracy and consistency of business data. Assist in identifying trends, issues, and opportunities based on data analysis to support decision-making. Develop and improve data tracking systems or templates to increase reporting efficiency. Requirements : Bachelor’s degree in Business, Statistics, Industrial Engineering, or a related field. 1–2 years of experience i

reporting efficiency. Requirements : Bachelor’s degree in Business, Statistics, Industrial Engineering, or a related field. 1–2 years of experience in data analysis, business operations, or project support. Strong analytical and numerical skills with attention to detail. Proficient in Microsoft Excel and familiar with data visualization tools. Comfortable handling large datasets and transforming them into actionable insights.

cesses that support data collection and analysis. Tugas dan Tanggung Jawab: Membuat dan mengembangkan dashboard sesuai kebutuhan analisis perusahaan. Melakukan pengolahan dan analisis data untuk mendukung laporan kinerja penjualan dan operasional. Menyajikan hasil analisis dalam bentuk laporan visual dan insight bisnis bagi manajemen. Berkoordinasi dengan tim terkait untuk memastikan konsistensi, validitas, dan keakuratan data. Mendukung proses pengambilan keputusan strategis melalui penyediaan data yang akurat dan relevan Kualifikasi: Pendidikan minimal S1 dari jurusan Statistika, Matematika, Akuntansi, atau Teknik. Memiliki pengalaman kerja minimal 1 tahun di bidang data analysis, reporting, atau business analytics. Men

istika, Matematika, Akuntansi, atau Teknik. Memiliki pengalaman kerja minimal 1 tahun di bidang data analysis, reporting, atau business analytics. Menguasai Microsoft Excel, Word, dan PowerPoint (advanced level). Terampil menggunakan Power BI untuk pembuatan dashboard dan visualisasi data. Mampu mengolah dan menganalisis data dalam jumlah besar dengan ketelitian tinggi. Memiliki kemampuan berpikir analitis dan numerik yang kuat. Mampu bekerja sama dan berkoordinasi dengan baik lintas divisi. Komunikatif, detail-oriented, dan mampu bekerja di bawah tenggat waktu.

Deskripsi:
Job Description Data Analysis and Interpretation: Utilize tools like Google Data Studio, BigQuery, and Power BI to analyze Marketing data and extract meaningful insights. Developing Reporting Dashboards: Create dynamic dashboards and reports that provide real-time insights into Sales, Marketing, Product performance. Collaborating with Sales and Marketing Teams: Work closely with other teams to understand their data needs and provide insights that inform strategy and decision-making. Data Integration and Management: Integrate data from various sources to provide a comprehensive view of Products, Services, Campaigns, Company performance. Performance

and Management: Integrate data from various sources to provide a comprehensive view of Products, Services, Campaigns, Company performance. Performance Tracking: Monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure the effectiveness of campaigns, activities and strategies. Monitoring and Alerts: Set up a data-driven system to alert positive and negative deviations for key parameters Predictive Analysis: Use data to predict trends and market movements, aiding in proactive strategy development. Training and Support: Provide training and support to team members in using data analysis tools and understanding reports. Be an independently working professional with a creative mind and drive for results and success Minimum Qualifications Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Data Science, Software Engineering, or a related field. Strong foundation in mathemati

or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Data Science, Software Engineering, or a related field. Strong foundation in mathematics, statistics, and data structures. Data analysis expert with experience in data programming languages and visualization software (Excel/Gsheet, SQL, Tableau, Metabase, Python, etc.) Advanced excel modeling and data visualization skills Very strong analytical and problem-solving mindset Data Warehouses: Snowflake, BigQuery, Amazon Redshift

Judul: Data Analyst
Perusahaan: Pt Sindang Pratama Jaya
Lokasi: Cirebon, Jawa Barat
Tipe Kerja: Full-time
Senioritas: -
Keahlian: Python, Excel, Power BI, Tableau, R, Dashboard

Deskripsi:
Lowongan: Data Analyst Kami mencari seorang Data Analyst yang bersemangat untuk mengubah data menjadi insight bisnis yang berdampak. Anda akan bekerja sama dengan berbagai departemen untuk mendukung pengambilan keputusan strategis melalui analisis, visualisasi, dan otomatisasi data. Tanggung Jawab Utama: Menganalisis data operasional bisnis untuk menemukan insight dan mendukung keputusan strategis. Membuat dan menyajikan laporan serta dashboard visual secara rutin untuk berbagai tim. Mengembangkan dan memelihara alur kerja pemrosesan data yang efisien, termasuk melakukan otomatisasi. Melayani permintaan analisis data dari berbagai departemen. Kualifikasi yang Dibutuhkan: Lulusan S1 dari jurusan terkait

rmasuk melakukan otomatisasi. Melayani permintaan analisis data dari berbagai departemen. Kualifikasi yang Dibutuhkan: Lulusan S1 dari jurusan terkait (Statistika, Ilmu Komputer, Sistem Informasi, Teknik Industri, Manajemen, dll.). Terbuka untuk fresh graduate atau memiliki pengalaman hingga 1 tahun di bidang analisis data. Wajib menguasai: Microsoft Excel (tingkat lanjut) dan Google BigQuery. Sangat diutamakan: Pengalaman dengan Excel Macros/VBA, Macro Recorder, dan Python untuk otomatisasi laporan dan proses data. Mampu mengubah data mentah menjadi cerita bisnis yang mudah dipahami. Nilai tambah jika familiar dengan BI tools (Tableau/Power BI). Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang baik.

dashboards for recurring data and performance tracking needs. Handle data validation, cleaning, and interpretation — ensuring accuracy and reliability across multiple sources. Collaborate with data engineers on data collection and structure improvements. Analyze complex datasets to provide meaningful insights and answer business questions from stakeholders. Requirements Must-Have Skills: Strong proficiency in SQL Experience with Python for data manipulation and analysis Hands-on experience using Power BI Additionally: Fluent in English (verbal and written) Nice-to-Have Skills: Familiarity with AWS or other cloud computing services Experience with other dashboarding tools (Tableau, Qlik, etc.) Basic understanding of data science concepts (machine learning, AI, etc.) Why You’ll Love Working Here Be part of a data-driven company that values curiosity, precision, and impact. Collaborate wit

achine learning, AI, etc.) Why You’ll Love Working Here Be part of a data-driven company that values curiosity, precision, and impact. If relocating from other parts of Indonesia, we offer one-time reimbursement for flights and relocation expenses .

Judul: Osint Analyst/investigator (people Search)
Perusahaan: Pt. Bukit Silikon Indonesia
Lokasi: Jakarta Barat, Jakarta Raya (hibrid)
Tipe Kerja: Full-time
Senioritas: Specialist
Keahlian: SQL, Python, Excel, R, Machine Learning, Communication, Analysis, Analytics

Deskripsi:
About Us: Join our dynamic, innovative team at PT Bukit Silikon Indonesia! We are a leading technology firm specializing in cutting-edge solutions in artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML). We're committed to transforming businesses and enhancing user experiences through smart technology. If you're passionate about AI and advanced analytics, come be a part of our mission to shape the future. Job Description: We are seeking a highly detail-oriented and resourceful People Search Analyst to help identify and locate individuals in the United States using limited or incomplete personal information. This

resourceful People Search Analyst to help identify and locate individuals in the United States using limited or incomplete personal information. This role involves deep online research, cross-referencing multiple public data sources, and using investigative or data tools to find accurate and verifiable results. You’ll play a key part in our data intelligence operations, helping clients or systems connect fragmented information to real people profiles. Responsibilities: Conduct online research to locate individuals based on partial data (e.g., name, city, phone number, or social media clues). Use open-source intelligence (OSINT) tools, public databases, and social media platforms to gather and verify information. Analyze, cross-check, and validate data from multiple sources to ensure accuracy. Build and maintain structured search reports and documentation of each investigation. Identify p

lidate data from multiple sources to ensure accuracy. Build and maintain structured search reports and documentation of each investigation. Identify patterns, aliases, or connections between individuals and related entities. Work with technical teams to improve automation tools or search processes (if applicable). Ensure compliance with all privacy and data protection laws (GDPR, CCPA, etc.). Qualifications: Bachelor’s degree in Criminology, Data Science, Information Systems, Intelligence Studies, Journalism , or a related field. Prior experience as a Fraud Analyst , People Locator Specialist, Contact Information Researcher, Skip Tracing Specialist, Investigation Analyst , or Data Verification Specialist is highly desirable. Proven experience in people search , background checks , skip tracing , private investigation , or OSINT research . Proficiency with online research, advanced Google

ce in people search , background checks , skip tracing , private investigation , or OSINT research . Proficiency with online research, advanced Google operators, and open-source data platforms. Familiarity with public record databases (LexisNexis, BeenVerified, Spokeo, Whitepages, Pipl, etc.). Strong analytical, documentation, and pattern recognition skills. Excellent written and verbal communication in English. High attention to detail and ability to work independently. Preferred / Nice to have skills: Hands-on experience with OSINT or investigation tools (Maltego, SpiderFoot, IntelTechniques, etc.). Technical familiarity with APIs or scripting languages (Python, SQL) for data enrichment or automation. Knowledge of social media investigation techniques and digital footprint analysis. Background in data compliance, digital forensics, or threat intelligence. Prior work experience in the U

on techniques and digital footprint analysis. Background in data compliance, digital forensics, or threat intelligence. Prior work experience in the US legal, data, or security research sector. Why Join Us? Competitive salary. Hybrid working. Strategic office location. Accessible by TransJakarta Bus. Opportunity to work with some of the brightest minds in the industry. Career development opportunities and access to ongoing professional training. A culture that values innovation, inclusivity, and sustainability.

Menyusun laporan mingguan yang ringk

sosial, dll). Menganalisis data untuk mengidentifikasi tren pasar, perubahan strategi, serta peluang atau risiko. Menyusun laporan mingguan yang ringkas, sistematis, dan mudah dipahami. Memberikan rekomendasi berbasis data untuk mendukung strategi perusahaan. Menjaga akurasi data dan konsistensi metode analisis. Mendukung pengembangan tools internal untuk membantu proses pemantauan kompetitor. Kualifikasi Pendidikan minimal S1 di bidang Statistik, Ekonomi, Data Science, Business Intelligence, atau terkait. Pengalaman minimal 1–2 tahun sebagai Data Analyst (fresh graduate dipersilakan melamar). Terbiasa bekerja dengan data dalam jumlah besar dan menghasilkan insight yang bernilai. Menguasai tools ana

yst (fresh graduate dipersilakan melamar). Terbiasa bekerja dengan data dalam jumlah besar dan menghasilkan insight yang bernilai. Mampu membuat laporan yang jelas, terstruktur, dan mudah dipahami. Mampu bekerja secara mandiri maupun kolaboratif. Proaktif, analitis, dan berorientasi pada hasil. Deskripsi:
Senior Product Analyst / Senior Product Operations Analyst (Data-Focused) Department: Product Operations Location: Remote (Indonesia) Role Overview We’re looking for a data-driven Senior Product Analyst / Senior Product Operations Analyst with a knack for root cause analysis (RCA) , a solid grasp of product operations , and can connect the dots between data and product operations . You’ll use dashboards, data pulls, and ML-driven outputs to identify patterns, troubleshoot performance issues, and help the business make smarter decisions faster. You won’t be coding full dashboards — Instead, you’ll slice and dice the data , investigate a

es, and help the business make smarter decisions faster. You won’t be coding full dashboards — Instead, you’ll slice and dice the data , investigate anomalies, partner with analytics to get deeper pulls and collaborate with analytics/data science teams to apply machine learning insights in a product operations setting. Key Responsibilities Root Cause Analysis & Troubleshooting Investigate performance anomalies (e.g., contact rate drops, deliverability issues, spam triggers, carrier code failures). Use Tableau and backend data to trace issues from symptom to root cause. Document RCAs with clear findings, proposed solutions, and follow-up on implementation. Data Analysis & Operational Insights Monitor and interpret KPIs like contact rates, deliverability %, spam block rates, and conversion rates. Perform ongoing trend analysis and shareouts to inform daily operational decisions. Good to ha

liverability %, spam block rates, and conversion rates. Perform ongoing trend analysis and shareouts to inform daily operational decisions. Good to have if you can apply AI/ML-powered tools to detect hidden patterns, predict anomalies, and automate parts of the analysis process. Experimentation & Optimization Design and evaluate A/B tests and controlled experiments on texting cadences, campaign routing, and engagement strategies. Analyze experiment outcomes (including ML-based predictions) to recommend data-backed optimizations . Reporting & Communication Deliver recurring performance reports for key product and growth metrics — ensuring they lead to clear, actionable changes . Present findings clearly to both technical and non-technical teams. Collaborate closely with the Data Analytics and Data Science teams for custom pulls, ML insights, and deeper analysis. Qualifications Must-Have:

ams. Collaborate closely with the Data Analytics and Data Science teams for custom pulls, ML insights, and deeper analysis. Qualifications Must-Have: 4+ years experience as a Data Analyst, Product Analyst, Product Operations Analyst, or similar role. Strong RCA skills — methodical, detail-oriented, able to find the true cause of an issue. Proficiency with BI tools (especially Tableau ) for insight generation. Ability to interpret large datasets, identify anomalies, and spot trends quickly. Quick learner with the ability to grasp new product workflows and data pipelines fast. Excellent verbal and written communication skills. Nice-to-Have: Basic understanding of ML models (classification, regression, clustering) and their business applications. Basic SQL querying skills for self-service exploration. Familiarity with messaging operations (10DLC, toll-free, compliance). Experience in A/B te

ns. Basic SQL querying skills for self-service exploration. Familiarity with messaging operations (10DLC, toll-free, compliance). Experience in A/B testing and campaign optimization. What Success Looks Like Every RCA you own leads to a clear, evidence-backed solution . Trends and risks are spotted early, preventing performance losses. You become the bridge between product operations and analytics , turning data into decisions that move the needle. Should be comfortable working from 6.30 pm to 3.30 am WIB.

About Verdant : Verdant is a plantation science company in North Sumatra driving sustainable, high-yield solutions for the Indonesian oil palm industry. Our mission is to boost productivity on existing land — helping reduce deforestation, lower emissions, and strengthen long-term food security. We combine world-class plantation science with hands-on field implementation. From genetics to agronomy and soil health, our teams work side by side to deliver practical science that makes a real difference. We are now expanding our Soil Health team to strengthen soil regeneration and sustainable agronomy programs — focusing on improving soil function, organic matter, and long-term plantation resilience through science-

neration and sustainable agronomy programs — focusing on improving soil function, organic matter, and long-term plantation resilience through science-based approaches and collaborative field implementation. What You Will Do : Support the planning, coordination, and evaluation of soil health regeneration initiatives across Verdant’s operations. Work closely with field, plantation science, and sustainability teams to implement best practices that improve soil quality and long-term productivity. Conduct testing and provide recommendations for soil-improvement solutions in both nursery and field trials. Collect, manage, and analyse trial data, and prepare clear reports and presentations. Occasionally travel to field sites to support trial activities and data collection. What We Are Looking For : Bachelor’s degree (S1) in Agriculture (Agronomy, Soil Science, Agribusiness), Biology (ecology, m

ities and data collection. What We Are Looking For : Bachelor’s degree (S1) in Agriculture (Agronomy, Soil Science, Agribusiness), Biology (ecology, microbiology), or related field. Strong interest in soil regeneration and sustainable plantation management. Good statistical analysis, communication, and teamwork skills. Ability to work independently and collaboratively across disciplines. Experience with microbial analysis or nitrogen-fixing symbionts is a plus. Comfortable communicating in English. Why Join Us At Verdant, you will be part of a mission-driven and science-led team committed to transforming plantation productivity responsibly. You will have the opportunity to: Work on cutting-edge soil regeneration innovations that directly improve environmental and economic outcomes. Collaborate with passionate scientists and field professionals across diverse disciplines. Gain exposure to

prove environmental and economic outcomes. Collaborate with passionate scientists and field professionals across diverse disciplines. Gain exposure to both plantation science and real-world operations — from field data to practical implementation. Contribute to a sustainable future for Indonesia’s palm industry

platforms and analytics with strong communication skills and a consultative mindset. Company Description About Grab and Our Workplace Grab is Southeast Asia's leading superapp. From getting your favourite meals delivered to helping you manage your finances and getting around town hassle-free, we've got your back with everything. In Grab, purpose gives us joy and habits build excellence, while harnessing the power of Technology and AI to deliver the mission of driving Southeast Asia forward by economically empowering everyone, with heart, hunger, honour, and humility. Job Description Get to Know the Team We drive innovation and operational excellence by turning data into actionable strategies that elevate the end-to-end exp

ription Get to Know the Team We drive innovation and operational excellence by turning data into actionable strategies that elevate the end-to-end experience for consumers, driver-partners, and merchant-partners. From optimizing transaction flows and platform efficiency to enhancing reliability, we strive to make Grab the first choice, every time. Get to Know the Role You will be responsible for all matters related to data ETL, creation of dashboards and development of data driven insights. In addition, you will provide day to day data support to the Transformation and Strategy Office team. You will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams including Corporate Strategy, Finance, and Analytics, as well as other key business units. In this role, you are expected to contribute to strategic planning and data-driven insights that support business growth and decision-making. Your work wi

his role, you are expected to contribute to strategic planning and data-driven insights that support business growth and decision-making. Your work will involve translating analytical findings into actionable recommendations, aligning initiatives across teams, and ensuring strategic priorities are executed effectively to drive organizational impact. You will be directly report to the manager. The role will based onsite. The Critical Tasks You Will Perform Be an industry subject matter expert in using data to measure and analyze business/product performance in each of our markets and lines of business. Lead the exploration of business/product issues/opportunities, uncover insights and/or identify targeted areas for business growth. Localize, tune in-production models to new cities / markets to enable product velocity. Provide thought leadership and generate data-driven hypotheses to solve

tune in-production models to new cities / markets to enable product velocity. Provide thought leadership and generate data-driven hypotheses to solve key Product/Business problems. Develop mixed effect, causal inference models to understand interaction effects or product configurations that are working sub optimally. Build and manage anomaly detection systems to intelligently alert slow-moving changes or sudden anomalies in product or system metrics. Develop analytics tools to help data teams and other disciplines be more at debugging, data summarization and at analysis of results. Qualifications What Essential Skills You Will Need 4+ years of experience, preferably in the e-commerce or the Internet industry. A minimum of Bachelor's/Master's degree, in Analytics, Statistics, Software, Mathematics, Economics, Computer Science or Engineering Experience in foundation in data query/manipula

's degree, in Analytics, Statistics, Software, Mathematics, Economics, Computer Science or Engineering Experience in foundation in data query/manipulation using SQL and data visualization tools (PowerBI). Strong statistical knowledge - ideally having utilized controlled experiments in the industry. Able to speak and write Both in Bahasa & English Additional Information Life at Grab We care about your well-being at Grab, here are some of the global benefits we offer: We have your back with Term Life Insurance and comprehensive Medical Insurance. With GrabFlex, create a benefits package that suits your needs and aspirations. Celebrate moments that matter in life with loved ones through Parental and Birthday leave , and give back to your communities through Love-all-Serve-all (LASA) volunteering leave We have a confidential Grabber Assistance Programme to guide and uplift you and your loved

nities through Love-all-Serve-all (LASA) volunteering leave We have a confidential Grabber Assistance Programme to guide and uplift you and your loved ones through life's challenges. Balancing personal commitments and life's demands are made easier with our FlexWork arrangements such as differentiated hours What We Stand For At Grab We are committed to building an inclusive and equitable workplace that provides equal opportunity for Grabbers to grow and perform at their best. We consider all candidates fairly and equally regardless of nationality, ethnicity, race, religion, age, gender, family commitments, physical and mental impairments or disabilities, and other attributes that make them unique.

Deskripsi:
Kami adalah NCR Group (NCR Sport, Starting Lane, Rechampx, Hoops Point), perusahaan multi-brand di bidang perlengkapan, pakaian, dan sepatu olahraga kekinian. Berdiri sejak 2012, kami telah membantu jutaan keluarga Indonesia dalam memilih perlengkapan olahraga yang mendukung gaya hidup aktif dan sehat. Data dari DataBridge Market Research memproyeksikan pertumbuhan 7,16% untuk industri perlengkapan olahraga di Indonesia dari tahun 2025 hingga 2032. Industri ini sendiri secara keseluruhan bernilai USD 3,25 miliar di tahun 2024. Industri perlengkapan olahraga tumbuh subur, dan dengan demikian, kami juga ikut berkembang pesat. Kami telah memiliki 13 store di Bandung (Gandapura, Paskal, Gatsu, PVJ, KBP), Jakarta (PP, Kokas, PIM), Bogor, Sentul, Tanger

a ikut berkembang pesat. Kami telah memiliki 13 store di Bandung (Gandapura, Paskal, Gatsu, PVJ, KBP), Jakarta (PP, Kokas, PIM), Bogor, Sentul, Tangerang (Serpong), dan Bekasi. Kami berencana untuk terus berekspansi ke kota-kota lainnya di Indonesia dalam 1-2 tahun ke depan. Kami mencari orang-orang yang ingin bergabung dengan tim kami yang diisi oleh anak muda yang ambisius, kreatif, dan dinamis. Sebagai Sales & Marketing Officer, Anda akan bertanggung jawab untuk brand Rechampx; menjadi jembatan antara brand dengan customer. Tanggung Jawab Merencanakan, mengelola, dan mengoptimalkan kanal penjualan online/offline serta jaringan reseller. Melakukan riset dan analisis tren gaya hidup sehat dan olahraga untuk mengidentifikasi peluang baru dan meningkatkan exposure brand. Mengimplementasikan campaign marketing (konten, promo, dan aktivasi online/offline). Memantau dan mengevaluasi kinerja

n meningkatkan exposure brand. Mengimplementasikan campaign marketing (konten, promo, dan aktivasi online/offline). Role: Software Research Engineer (Computer Vision / Machine Learning Specialization) FORMULATRIX is expanding its Bandung team! As a Creative City of Design, Bandung has been renowned for its smart people and creative communities. We're looking for enthusiastic individuals with a passion for exploring cutting-edge technology, particularly in laboratory automation. As a Software Research Engineer in the FORMULATRIX Innovation Lab team, you will study and implement algorithms from research papers, adapt them to solve the problem at hand, and develop modular code that can be easily integrated into parent projects. For this particular role, you will focus on solving machine le

m at hand, and develop modular code that can be easily integrated into parent projects. For this particular role, you will focus on solving machine learning and computer vision (CV/ML) problems. You’ll be working on the technology that will be deployed to our liquid handling robots and laboratory automation products. What Will You Do: Study and implement machine learning and computer vision algorithms. Develop understanding of the problem domain and propose innovative solutions. Define and evaluate objective metrics of system performance. Write modular proof-of-concept code designed for easy integration into parent projects. Write reports and present findings. Be a thought partner for other engineers, supporting them with your skillset. What We Look For: At least Bachelor’s (S1/D4) degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Electrical Engineering, or equivalent professional expe

t We Look For: At least Bachelor’s (S1/D4) degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Electrical Engineering, or equivalent professional experience in CV/ML software development. Previous industry experience is a plus but not required. Fresh graduates are welcome. Solid coding skills in modern programming languages, preferably Python, C#, or C++. Strong background in machine learning tasks and algorithms (image classification, object detection, language models, etc.). Well versed in data preparation, training, deployment, and maintenance of machine learning models. Enjoys reading research papers and learning the latest advances in the field. Previous experience in research is very much appreciated. Familiar with relevant libraries: TensorFlow, PyTorch, OpenCV, Scikit-learn, Scikit-image, ONNX Runtime, etc. A passion for learning new technical skills. Highly motivated and strong

TensorFlow, PyTorch, OpenCV, Scikit-learn, Scikit-image, ONNX Runtime, etc. A passion for learning new technical skills. Highly motivated and strong team player. Excellent communication skills in both written and spoken English. Nice to Have Experience with LLM architecture (transformer, attention, tokenizer, etc.), and prompting techniques (RAG, chain of thought, agentic workflow, etc.). A good understanding of what constitutes a high-quality datase, and how to gather such datasets. Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Google Cloud, etc.) for machine learning training and/or deployment. Experience training with GPU and Google TPU Familiarity with MLops principles. Knowledge of computer vision algorithms: filters, histogram, contour, blob, edge detection, SIFT, ORB, camera calibration, etc. Knowledge of Software design patterns and best practices in programming. Not afraid of hardware.
, edge detection, SIFT, ORB, camera calibration, etc. Knowledge of Software design patterns and best practices in programming. Not afraid of hardware. Good command of math and physics.

Retainer-Based Pricing: Clients pay only for intakes that meet their specific criteria, as we handle all preliminary processes. sure claimants are motivated to pursue their claims. Product Manager – Compliance & Privacy Location: Indonesia (100% Remote) Function: Product Operations Reports to: Director – Product Operations / Compliance Overview We at Demandlane are looking for a Product Manager – Compliance & Privacy to lead our global compliance initiatives across marketing, communications, and data operations. This role combines regulatory understanding, operational rigor, and product thinking — designing the systems, processes, and tools that keep our customer communications compliant with FTC, TCPA, state mini-TCPA, CAN-SPAM, and related privacy laws. You’ll manage the Compliance & Privacy team , oversee audits and process automation , and work cross-fu

mini-TCPA, CAN-SPAM, and related privacy laws. You’ll manage the Compliance & Privacy team , oversee audits and process automation , and work cross-functionally with Engineering, Product Ops, Marketing, and Call Center Operations to ensure full adherence to evolving regulatory frameworks. Demandlane is a Silicon Valley based company focused on case acquisition for lawyers. Specifically, we focus on mass tort case acquisition, leveraging AI to improve case acquisition. We have a team of senior product, marketing, and engineering leaders from Silicon Valley, India, Indonesia, Nigeria and Romania with proven experience in launching successful products. We provide a fast-paced environment, work on many exciting problem areas, offer opportunities to learn and grow, and offer excellent pay based on performance. We are a remote-first team spread across many cities in India, Romania, Indonesia,

s to learn and grow, and offer excellent pay based on performance. We are a remote-first team spread across many cities in India, Romania, Indonesia, Nigeria and the US. ed tools and processes (e.g., DNC scrub systems, alert views, audit forms, and dashboards). No more than three contact attempts per day per consumer. Dialer and SMS systems are configured for compliant time zones and throttling. Ensure SMS and email compliance , including: Clear opt-out options (STOP/unsubscribe links). Immediate supp

d for compliant time zones and throttling. Ensure SMS and email compliance , including: Clear opt-out options (STOP/unsubscribe links). Immediate suppression of opted-out contacts. Honest sender identification, subject lines, and physical address inclusion. Oversee Press-1 and automated call compliance , including consent tracking and pre-recorded message disclosures. 🧮 Audit, Risk & Remediation Conduct daily and weekly manual audits of campaigns and assets. Identify non-compliant behaviors and create Corrective and Preventive Action (CAPA) plans. Work with Product, Ads, and Engineering teams to implement and validate fixes . Maintain detailed audit trails, proof-of-consent records, and documentation for internal and external reviews. Analyze impact of CAPA implementations to ensure long-term risk mitigation. 🔒 Privacy & Data Protection Maintain alignment with U.S. federal and state priv

ze impact of CAPA implementations to ensure long-term risk mitigation. 🔒 Privacy & Data Protection Maintain alignment with U.S. federal and state privacy standards and international data protection best practices . Conduct periodic privacy reviews for new features or campaigns. 🧠 Continuous Learning & Stakeholder Engagement Stay current with evolving compliance and privacy landscapes through webinars, certifications, and external training. Conduct internal workshops to educate cross-functional teams on compliance best practices. Represent Compliance in cross-departmental projects to ensure proactive integration of regulatory principles. Requirements 🎓 Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Business, Law, In

s-departmental projects to ensure proactive integration of regulatory principles. Judul: Human Resource Development

Deskripsi:
Peluang Karier PT Dinamika Polimerindo membuka kesempatan bagi fresh graduate/profesional Human Resource yang adaptif, dan berorientasi pada pengembangan manusia untuk bergabung bersama kami. Posisi ini akan menjadi penggerak utama dalam memastikan perusahaan memiliki talenta terbaik untuk mendukung pertumbuhan bisnis yang terus meningkat. Di perusahaan manufaktur yang dinamis seperti kami, peran Anda tidak hanya berfokus pada pengembangan karyawan, tetapi juga memastikan budaya kerja yang produktif, sehat, dan berkelanjutan. Tanggung Jawab Utama Mengelola dan memperbarui data karyawan dalam sistem dan arsip (fisik maupun digital) termasuk dokumen pribadi, kontrak, perubahan status, dan file ketenagakerjaan lainnya. Menyusun

karyawan dalam sistem dan arsip (fisik maupun digital) termasuk dokumen pribadi, kontrak, perubahan status, dan file ketenagakerjaan lainnya. Menyusun, mengelola, dan mendistribusikan dokumen HR seperti kontrak kerja, perpanjangan kontrak, surat tugas, surat peringatan, surat keputusan , dan administrasi lainnya. Mengelola absensi karyawan , termasuk input data, verifikasi keterlambatan, izin, cuti, dan lembur sebagai dasar laporan bulanan. Mengurus administrasi BPJS Kesehatan & BPJS Ketenagakerjaan : pendaftaran, mutasi, perubahan data, penonaktifan, dan pelaporan rutin. Menangani seluruh proses administratif rekrutmen: posting lowongan, seleksi berkas, penjadwalan interview, administrasi onboarding, dan pembuatan dokumen penerimaan karyawan baru. Membantu penyusunan dan pelaksanaan administrasi pelatihan , termasuk undangan, absensi peserta, dokumentasi, dan sertifikat. Menyusun lapora

an baru. Membantu penyusunan dan pelaksanaan administrasi pelatihan , termasuk undangan, absensi peserta, dokumentasi, dan sertifikat. Menyusun laporan HR rutin seperti laporan absensi, turnover, rekap BPJS, dan laporan administratif lainnya sebagai kebutuhan manajemen. Memberikan dukungan administratif dalam kegiatan HR lainnya yang bersifat operasional dan harian. Keterampilan dan Kualifikasi yang Dibutuhkan Gelar sarjana di bidang Manajemen Sumber Daya Manusia, Psikologi, atau bidang terkait. Minimal 1 tahun pengalaman dalam peran serupa/fresh graduate dipersilahkan. Pemahaman yang kuat tentang praktik manajemen sumber daya manusia, termasuk rekrutmen, pelatihan, pengembangan karier, dan manajemen kinerja. Kemampuan komunikasi yang efektif, baik lisan maupun tertulis, untuk berinteraksi dengan berbagai tingkatan karyawan. Keterampilan analitis yang kuat untuk mengidentifikasi dan meny

if, baik lisan maupun tertulis, untuk berinteraksi dengan berbagai tingkatan karyawan. Keterampilan analitis yang kuat untuk mengidentifikasi dan menyelesaikan masalah sumber daya manusia. Pemahaman tentang peraturan ketenagakerjaan yang berlaku di Indonesia. Kemampuan beradaptasi dan bekerja dalam lingkungan yang dinamis. Manfaat Bergabung dengan Kami Paket kompensasi yang kompetitif, termasuk gaji pokok, tunjangan dan program asuransi kesehatan dan manfaat lainnya yang komprehensif untuk karyawan dan keluarga. Kesempatan untuk pengembangan karier dan pelatihan berkelanjutan yang mendukung pertumbuhan secara profesional. Lingkungan kerja yang positif, kolaboratif, dan mendukung di mana karyawan dihargai dan diberikan peluang untuk berkembang. Fasilitas perkantoran yang modern dan nyaman, serta opsi fleksibilitas dalam bekerja. Tentang PT Dinamika Polimerindo PT Dinamika Polimerindo adal

ng. Fasilitas perkantoran yang modern dan nyaman, serta opsi fleksibilitas dalam bekerja. Tentang PT Dinamika Polimerindo PT Dinamika Polimerindo adalah pemimpin industri dalam pengembangan dan manufaktur produk plastic injection berkualitas tinggi di Indonesia. Didirikan pada tahun 1996, kami telah tumbuh menjadi perusahaan terkemuka dengan reputasi unggul dalam inovasi, kualitas, dan layanan pelanggan. Kami berkomitmen untuk menjadi mitra terpercaya bagi pelanggan kami dan terus memperluas jangkauan kami di pasar domestik maupun internasional. Jika Anda tertarik untuk menjadi bagian dari tim kami yang dinamis, lamar posisi ini sekarang!

Deskripsi:
HRD Staff PT. Pacific Refuto System sebuah perusahaan yang bergerak di bidang cooling system yang menyediakan sistem pendingin otomatis terbaik, Saat ini kami membuka kesempatan bagi seorang HRD Staff yang berpengalaman dan kompeten untuk bergabung dengan tim kami. Dalam posisi ini, Anda akan berperan penting dalam mendukung pengembangan dan implementasi strategi sumber daya manusia yang selaras dengan visi dan tujuan perusahaan. Sebagai HRD Staff, Anda akan terlibat dalam berbagai aspek manajemen sumber daya manusia, mulai dari rekrutmen hingga pengembangan karyawan. Tugas dan Tanggung Jawab: Memahami end-to-end recruitment process (job posting, screening, interview, offering, onboarding) dan menyusun strategi rekrutmen. Memahami dan menge

Memahami end-to-end recruitment process (job posting, screening, interview, offering, onboarding) dan menyusun strategi rekrutmen. Memahami dan mengelola platform rekrutmen online (Jobstreet, LinkedIn, dsb). Mampu mengelola kerja sama dengan instansi, lembaga, yang bekerja sama dalam hal rekrutmen. Mengurus administrasi kepegawaian seperti kontrak kerja, cuti, izin, database karyawan, absensi, BPJS Kesehatan dan BPJS Ketenagakerjaan. Membuat laporan HR bulanan (recruitment, turnover, rekap absensi, data karyawan, dll) Mengadakan kegiatan pelatihan dan pengembangan karyawan. Membantu dalam pengembangan dan pemeliharaan kebijakan dan prosedur HR. Penyusunan surat dan dokumen resmi perusahaan. Kualifikasi: Pendidikan terakhir minimal S1 (diutamakan jurusan Psikologi/ Administrasi/ Hukum/ Management). Memiliki pengalaman di bidang HR Generalist minimal 3 tahun (lebih disukai di bidang konst

amakan jurusan Psikologi/ Administrasi/ Hukum/ Management). Memiliki pengalaman di bidang HR Generalist minimal 3 tahun (lebih disukai di bidang konstruksi atau jasa teknik). Mampu menangani informasi dan dokumen yang bersifat rahasia. Menguasai metode interview dan psikotes. Memahami UU Ketenagakerjaan, BPJS Kesehatan dan BPJS Ketenagakerjaan. Mampu mengoperasikan MS Office dengan baik (Word, Excel, & Power Point). Mampu bekerja secara individu maupun dalam kelompok. Mampu berkomunikasi dengan baik kepada semua level dan departemen. Memiliki kemampuan interpersonal yang baik dalam membangun hubungan kerja yang efektif dengan berbagai pihak. Mampu mengelola administrasi secara teliti, rajin, disiplin dan filling yang rapi Mampu bekerja di bawah tekanan, deadline, dan keakuratan data Dapat bergabung secepatnya Bersedia ditempatkan di Cimone – Tangerang

Judul: Human Capital & General Affairs Manager
Perusahaan: Vapexpress Group
Lokasi: Bogor, Jawa Barat
Tipe Kerja: Full-time
Senioritas: Manager
Keahlian: R

Deskripsi:
HUMAN CAPITAL & GENERAL AFFAIRS MANAGER COMPANY PROFILE Vapexpress Retail Group adalah perusahaan Retail vape yang berkembang pesat di Indonesia, dengan jaringan outlet yang tersebar di Bogor, Bekasi, Jakarta, dan Tangerang Selatan. Berdiri sejak tahun 2022, Vapexpress hadir sebagai pelopor vape store modern yang berfokus pada pelayanan prima, edukasi produk, serta pengalaman belanja yang nyaman dan berkualitas bagi pelanggan. Kami terus tumbuh dan berinovasi melalui pengelolaan bisnis yang profesional, tata kelola yang efisien, serta komitmen tinggi dalam membangun sumber daya manusia yang unggul. Dengan visi menjadi perusahaan waralaba supply chain vape terpercaya di Indonesia, Vapexpress berkomitmen menghadirkan produk

ya manusia yang unggul. Dengan visi menjadi perusahaan waralaba supply chain vape terpercaya di Indonesia, Vapexpress berkomitmen menghadirkan produk dan layanan terbaik bagi setiap pelanggan di seluruh cabang kami. Bergabunglah bersama kami dan jadilah bagian dari tim yang bersemangat, adaptif, dan berorientasi pada keunggulan untuk tumbuh bersama Vapexpress menuju ritel vape berstandar nasional. KUALIFIKASI PERKERJAAN : Pendidikan minimal S1 semua jurusan, diutamakan jurusan Psikologi, Antropologi, Ilmu Politik Pengalaman kerja minimal 10 tahun di bidang Human Resources, Recruitment, atau Training & Development dan minimal 5 tahun di level managerial pada industry (Retail, FMCG, Tobacco, Distribusi, Manufaktur) Memahami end-to-end Human Capital Management: Recruitment, Learning & Development, Organizational Development, Compensation & Benefit, Employee Relation, dan HR Administration B

apital Management: Recruitment, Learning & Development, Organizational Development, Compensation & Benefit, Employee Relation, dan HR Administration Berpengalaman dalam develop sistem assessment psikologi serta mampu membaca interpretasi hasil psikotes Memiliki pengalaman dalam menyusun, mengelola & mengontrol budget Human Capital , termasuk Budget rekrutmen, Budget training & development, Budget benefit & program engagement, dan Budget headcount planning Mampu menyusun strategi manajemen SDM, mengelola struktur organisasi, KPI, dan HR program berbasis data Memahami UU Ketenagakerjaan, peraturan pemerintah, serta best practice HR modern Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi, problem solving, conflict management, dan decision making yang kuat DESKRIPSI PERKERJAAN : Strategic Human Capital Management Menyusun strategi HC sesuai kebutuhan bisnis dan arah pertumbuhan perusahaan. Mengembangkan manpow

PSI PERKERJAAN : Strategic Human Capital Management Menyusun strategi HC sesuai kebutuhan bisnis dan arah pertumbuhan perusahaan. Mengembangkan manpower planning, struktur organisasi, dan sistem pengelolaan talent. Recruitment & Assessment Mengelola proses rekrutmen end-to-end, termasuk alokasi dan efisiensi budget hiring. Mengembangkan sistem assessment psikologi dan standar kompetensi kandidat. Learning & Development Merancang kurikulum pelatihan serta memastikan penggunaan budget training secara efektif. Menyusun career path, program pengembangan, dan succession planning. Employee Relations & HR Operations Menangani isu karyawan, hubungan industrial, dan memastikan penyelesaian yang adil & profesional. Mengawasi seluruh administrasi HC termasuk absensi, kontrak kerja, dan dokumentasi personalia. Performance Management Mengelola sistem KPI, evaluasi kinerja, dan program peningkatan per

ermasuk absensi, kontrak kerja, dan dokumentasi personalia. Performance Management Mengelola sistem KPI, evaluasi kinerja, dan program peningkatan performa karyawan. Leadership & Team Development Memimpin tim HC dengan profesional, empati, dan kedisiplinan tinggi. Mendelegasikan tugas dengan tepat dan membangun budaya kerja yang sehat & produktif. Budgeting & Cost Management Menyusun, mengelola, dan mengontrol budget Human Capital (recruitment, L&D, engagement, HR tools). Melakukan analisis kebutuhan biaya dan memastikan efisiensi penggunaan budget. Menyusun laporan penggunaan budget dan rekomendasi efektivitas biaya jangka panjang. Payroll Management Human Capital Manager bertanggung jawab untuk memastikan proses payroll berjalan akurasi, tepat waktu, dan sesuai ketentuan hukum Tanggung Jawab Pengelolaan Payroll Mengawasi dan memastikan akurasi keseluruhan proses payroll bulanan, termas

tepat waktu, dan sesuai ketentuan hukum Tanggung Jawab Pengelolaan Payroll Mengawasi dan memastikan akurasi keseluruhan proses payroll bulanan, termasuk perhitungan gaji pokok, lembur, tunjangan, insentif, komisi, dan potongan. Berkoordinasi dengan Finance terkait pengeluaran payroll dan rekonsiliasi data. Menjamin kepatuhan terhadap UU Ketenagakerjaan, BPJS Kesehatan, BPJS Ketenagakerjaan, pajak PPh21, dan regulasi lainnya. Menjaga kerahasiaan data payroll dan menjadi penanggung jawab keamanan informasi gaji. Melakukan evaluasi berkala terhadap struktur gaji, skema insentif, dan standar benefit. Memastikan penyampaian payslip kepada karyawan secara tepat waktu. Kami percaya bahwa SDM unggul, pelayanan responsif, dan semangat kolaboratif adalah kunci kesuksesan bersama.

Judul: Recruiter Specialist
Perusahaan: Pt Odg Indonesia
Lokasi: Jakarta Raya
Tipe Kerja: Contract
Senioritas: Specialist
Keahlian: Excel, R, Communication

Deskripsi:
RESPONSIBILITIES AND DUTIES Responsible to carry out end-to-end recruitment and selection activities to find new employees in accordance with the required qualification and quality. Collaborate with hiring managers/users to identify manpower needs and job requirements. Create and post the job vacancy on several social media and various recruitment platforms such as Linkedin, Glints, Jobstreet, Karir.com, etc. and optimize all the features to get prospective candidates. Actively source resume/screen CV (Curriculum Vitae) and conduct initial screening interviews. Coordinate and facilitate interview, invites candidate by phone or email for an interview with Manager/users and relevant stakeholders, Administer or coordinate and

facilitate interview, invites candidate by phone or email for an interview with Manager/users and relevant stakeholders, Administer or coordinate and schedule the test and medical check-up as needed. Provide clear candidates review report and recommendation on 3-10 prospective candidate. Ensure the new hire get employee induction and office facilities are ready to use to support the work activities such as but not limited to the availability of stationery office, desk, computer/laptop, etc. Prepare the BPJS Kesehatan for a new employee, including any document for registration and assists co-workers to issue BPJS invoice payments that will be submitted to payroll, etc. Prepare and update an employment contract, ME (Management Evaluation) to any related managers, employment form, and other administrative duties Input the new employee’s data on the database system (HRIS) and archiving docu

any related managers, employment form, and other administrative duties Input the new employee’s data on the database system (HRIS) and archiving documents. Any other reasonable duties as directed by the HR Manager and/or management within known JOB SPECIFICATION Minimum graduated bachelor’s degrees in relevant major especially Psychology/ Management/ Law. Minimum 2 years of experience in relevant field as HR Officer or Recruitment Officer, and in relevant industries like Contractor, MEP, Manufacture, Oil & Gas. Have good communication skills, negotiation skills, and be able in a relationship with employees. Ability in using Microsoft Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and other basic computer literacy to support the works. Strong written and verbal communication skills in English.

employee relations). Proven ability to lead and manage multiple projects simultaneously. Excellent organizational, communication, and problem-solving skills. Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Word). Willing to travel for business purposes.

ioritizes the growth of its employees and provides an environment where they can work autonomously and impressively. onboarding, training, and employee relations Handling recruitment processes, from job posting, candidate screening, to interview coordination and hiring documentation Maintaining accurate employee records and ensuring compliance with relevant labour laws and regulations Supporting General Affairs functions, such as office administration, asset management, and vendor coordination Coordinating employee benefits and leave administration Organising and facilitating HR-related events and activities Providing HR-related guidance and support to managers and employees What We're Looking For: Minimum 2 years of experience in a generalist HR role, with hands-on exposure to recruitment and general affairs responsibilities, preferably in a fast-paced environment Strong understanding of HR best practices and Indonesian labour laws Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to

banking, consulting, or public accounting (preferably from a Big Four firm). PMO experience is highly desirable. Technical Skills: Advanced proficiency in MS Excel (financial modeling) & PowerPoint. Financial Planning & Analysis (FP&A) - Develop, coordinate, and control the budgeting and forecasting process for all IVF units. - Conduct variance analysis (budget vs actual) and recommend corrective actions. - Ensure each clinic/unit has clear, measurable, and realistic financial targets. 2. Performance Monitoring - Track key financial KPI

rective actions. - Ensure each clinic/unit has clear, measurable, and realistic financial targets. 2. ions. 7. We are a world-leading smart mobility SaaS company with over 2,300,000 subscribers across 23 countries and we are looking for a Operational Business Analyst to join our team. You will be the engine for continuous improvement within our operations. You will dive deep into our business processes, use data to uncover hidden opportunities, and design solutions that enhance efficiency, reduce costs, and improve service delivery. You will be a critical link between operational teams and management, turning insights into action. Key Job Descriptions: Process Analysis & Mapping: Conduct thorough analyses of existing operational processes to identify bot

ng insights into action. Key Job Descriptions: Process Analysis & Mapping: Conduct thorough analyses of existing operational processes to identify bottlenecks, inefficiencies, and areas for improvement. Data-Driven Insights: Collect, analyze, and interpret operational data (e.g., performance metrics, productivity rates, cost data) to generate actionable insights and support decision-making. Solution Design & Implementation: Develop and propose innovative solutions, workflows, and strategies to optimize operations. Lead or co-lead the implementation of these changes. Problem Solving: Tackle complex operational challenges head-on, using structured problem-solving methodologies to diagnose issues and implement effective fixes. Stakeholder Collaboration: Work closely with cross-functional teams (including Sales, Customer Service, Technology, and Field Operations) to gather requirements, alig

aboration: Work closely with cross-functional teams (including Sales, Customer Service, Technology, and Field Operations) to gather requirements, align on goals, and ensure smooth adoption of new processes. Performance Monitoring: Develop and track key performance indicators (KPIs) and dashboards to monitor the effectiveness of implemented changes and report on progress to stakeholders. Documentation: Create and maintain clear and concise documentation for all processes, procedures, and project plans. Qualifications & What We're Looking For: Educational Background: Bachelor’s degree from a reputable university in Engineering, Business, Economics, Mathematics, Statistics, or a related quantitative field. A Problem Solver at Heart: You have a natural curiosity and a proven ability to break down complex problems into manageable parts and develop practical solutions. Numerical & Analytical P

natural curiosity and a proven ability to break down complex problems into manageable parts and develop practical solutions. Numerical & Analytical Prowess: You are highly skilled in mathematics and working with numbers. Strong analytical skills with the ability to work with large datasets are essential. Experience with data analysis tools is a significant advantage. Excellent Energy & Dynamic Attitude: We are looking for someone with a positive, can-do attitude, who is proactive, agile, and excited to take on new challenges in a fast-paced environment. ENGLISH IS A MUST: Full professional proficiency in English, both written and verbal, is mandatory for regional reporting and communication. Communication Skills: Exceptional interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to explain complex concepts clearly and persuasively to diverse audiences. Team Player: A collaborative spi

and communication skills, with the ability to explain complex concepts clearly and persuasively to diverse audiences. Team Player: A collaborative spirit with the ability to build strong relationships and work effectively within a team.
